name: Web App: Tenant Dashboard & Project Detail Pages
objective: Authenticated web app with a tenant dashboard and project detail pages consuming the tenancy and usage APIs; all web UI features (knowledge graph included) free

review.note: P12 delivered the free authenticated web app (dashboard · project detail · documents · in-app graph) on the Knowledge Base design system; all constraints held (surface discipline, sealed-cookie BFF/no-CORS, unmetered /app web reads, show-once credential, 404-never-403, read-only/no plan-gating); all flagged deviations accepted (no fix slices); live-browser E2E deferred to P14. 8 durable-doc versions consolidated.
